skl_cpu_specs.h File Reference


Enumerations

enum  SKL_CPU_FEATURE {
  SKL_CPU_C = 0, SKL_CPU_X86 = 1, SKL_CPU_MMX = 2, SKL_CPU_SSE = 3,
  SKL_CPU_SSE2 = 4, SKL_CPU_REF = 5, SKL_CPU_ALT = 6 , SKL_CPU_DETECT = 7
}

Functions

SKL_CPU_FEATURE Skl_Detect_CPU_Feature ()

Detailed Description

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum SKL_CPU_FEATURE
 

This enumeration select the CPU instruction set low-level functions should use, if available.

See also:
Skl_Detect_CPU_Feature

SKL_MP4_ENC::Set_CPU

SKL_MP4_DEC::Set_CPU

Enumeration values:
SKL_CPU_C  Use C version only
SKL_CPU_X86  Use x86 instruction set
SKL_CPU_MMX  Use MMX instruction set
SKL_CPU_SSE  Use SSE instruction set
SKL_CPU_SSE2  Use SSE2 instruction set
SKL_CPU_REF  Use Reference (slow) implementation
SKL_CPU_ALT  Alternative implementation, for tests.
SKL_CPU_DETECT  System will attempt to autodetect available CPU features

Function Documentation

SKL_CPU_FEATURE Skl_Detect_CPU_Feature (   ) 
 

After autoprobing, this function returns the most efficient available feature.
